stores.name: Wegmans
stores.officialSummary: Wegmans' Hot Zone features a diverse selection of fresh produce, meats, and grocery items at competitive prices.
stores.statusReason: The latest Firecrawl snapshot shows a live Hot Zone assortment spanning produce, meat, grocery, and dairy.
highlights: Fresh produce including strawberries, avocados, and mixed peppers
Variety of meats such as chicken breast cutlets and strip steak
Grocery essentials like BBQ sauces and pasta
Dairy products including yogurt and cheese options

stores.name: Walmart
stores.officialSummary: Walmart offers a variety of grocery deals, including fresh produce and pantry staples at competitive prices.
stores.statusReason: The published catalog is broader than the primary Walmart deals landing page, which is expected when multiple official sources are combined.
highlights: Fresh Produce Deals
Rollback Prices on Popular Items
Best Sellers in Grocery
Special Offers on Snacks

stores.name: Aldi
stores.officialTitle: This Week's ALDI Finds | See What’s New This Week | ALDI US
stores.officialSummary: Discover the latest ALDI Finds this week, featuring a variety of products that won't last long.
stores.statusReason: Firecrawl confirmed the current weekly ALDI Finds window and merchandising themes for this cycle.
highlights: Fitness gear including tumblers and trainers
Home improvement items like plant lights and storage boxes
Kitchen supplies including mini wafflemakers and cast iron dutch ovens
Outdoor living products such as plants and garden supplies

stores.name: Lidl
stores.officialTitle: myLidl deals | Quality Products Low Prices | Lidl US
stores.officialSummary: Lidl offers a diverse range of exclusive deals for myLidl members, featuring discounts on various grocery categories.
stores.statusReason: Firecrawl captured an active myLidl member-deals page with clear category coverage and current item-level promotions.
highlights: Health & Beauty products like Cien charcoal facial cleanser and micellar water
Fresh Produce including blackberries and salad kits
Dairy items such as sweet cream butter and cheese slices
Meat & Poultry options including grass-fed ribeye steak and chicken Cordon bleu
